subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and spiritual beloved ones! Though it be eventide in this material world, yet praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و عزیزان روحانی هر چند در عالم جسمانی شامگاه است ولی الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual transformation, @entry by troops
